subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-14
subcodes.first_line: I hope that whosoever hears your words, sees your deeds and beholds your manners and behaviors may declare that these people are real Bahá'ís
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @call to action
